_comment: Strix Halo perf bars for the email-triage benchmark (#1277). 'enforce' is TEMPORARILY FALSE (report mode): the bars are not yet validated across runs and TTFT in particular is cold-start-dominated and wildly variable run-to-run (8.5s on the first release run, 51s on a later run) — an enforcing TTFT bar keeps false-failing the release without indicating a real regression. Same 'ship now, harden later' posture as the drafting/briefing judge gates. Report mode logs + uploads the perf metrics but does NOT block. Re-enforce once the bars are calibrated over several runs (tracking: re-enforce email perf gate). Values are kept as the current best-estimate targets. Loaded by gaia.eval.performance.load_perf_thresholds.
_gating: ttft_max_s, throughput_min_tps, pipeline_max_s, peak_memory_max_gb are GATING bars when enforced. NPU utilization is REPORTED-ONLY (no bar) — it is observed and exported but never gates the build.
